queries.question: Provide a list of all museums and also provide a list of planetariums with tickets priced at $15.
queries.sql:
SELECT Venue.name 
FROM Venue
WHERE Venue.educationalVenue = "Museum" OR Venue.educationalVenue = "Planetarium" AND Venue.ticketPrice = "$15"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?venue a :Venue .
  ?venue p:name ?name .
  ?venue p:educationalVenue ?educationalvenue_w .
  ?venue p:educationalVenue ?educationalvenue_w2 .
  ?venue p:ticketPrice ?ticketprice_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educationalvenue_w) = "Museum" || (STR(?educationalvenue_w2) = "Planetarium" && STR(?ticketprice_w) = "$15")))
}

queries.question: Give me the museums and planetariums with tickets priced at $15.
queries.sql:
SELECT Venue.name 
FROM Venue
WHERE (Venue.educationalVenue = "Museum" OR Venue.educationalVenue = "Planetarium") AND Venue.ticketPrice = "$15"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?venue a :Venue .
  ?venue p:name ?name .
  ?venue p:educationalVenue ?educationalvenue_w .
  ?venue p:educationalVenue ?educationalvenue_w2 .
  ?venue p:ticketPrice ?ticketprice_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?educationalvenue_w) = "Museum" || STR(?educationalvenue_w2) = "Planetarium")) && STR(?ticketprice_w) = "$15"))
}
